_note: Covers the SSR and page generation pipeline. renderToHTMLOrFlight is the App Router SSR entry point; renderToHTML/renderToHTMLImpl are the Pages Router equivalents. createComponentTree builds the React element tree for app routes. FlightRenderResult and RenderResult wrap rendering output. BaseServer orchestrates the server-side rendering pipeline. AppPageRouteModule invokes rendering for app routes. createInlinedDataReadableStream handles streaming RSC data into HTML. collectSegmentData handles segment-level data collection for PPR. Verified by grep in packages/next/src/server/ at 16e5f9e.
